gh_c4236f2f682f1448af33b055.title: Frontend developer/ Senior - Salary: $3000 - $4500
gh_c4236f2f682f1448af33b055.description:
📍 Location: Remote

🚀 Frontend Developer Needed (3+ Years Experience)

We're looking for a Frontend Developer with at least 3 years of experience to update and enhance an existing project:

https://bitbucket.org/mari-chain/lmng-2026/src/master/

Requirements:
✅ 3+ years of frontend development experience
✅ React.js / TypeScript
✅ Modern JavaScript, HTML, CSS
✅ Experience maintaining and improving existing applications

As part of the application process, please review the project repository, set it up locally, and share your thoughts on the current implementation. Specifically, we'd like to hear:
• Whether you can successfully run the project
• Any issues or improvements you identify
• What changes or enhancements you would make to the first landing page
• Your proposed approach for improving UI/UX, performance, and user engagement

Compensation:
💰 Hourly rate: $50–$80 USD (depending on experience and expertise)

Please send:
• Your CV 
• Availability
• Expected hourly rate
• Your feedback after reviewing the project

📩 Interested?
Contact me via Telegram(@chain_empires)

gh_c45fc98f0ddd46dc73d97833.title: Add: Repurpose AI — AI tool for freelancers to repurpose content
gh_c45fc98f0ddd46dc73d97833.description:
## Tool Suggestion: Repurpose AI

**URL:** https://tryrepurpose.com
**Category:** Productivity / Content Tools

Repurpose AI is an AI-powered tool that turns blog posts, podcast episodes, and YouTube videos into social media posts for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook automatically.

**Why it fits TheRemoteFreelancer:**
Freelancers who blog, podcast, or create content to attract clients often struggle to distribute that content across platforms. Repurpose AI handles that in under 60 seconds — paste once, get all platform formats.

- Free trial: 3 uses, no signup at tryrepurpose.com
- $29 lifetime deal (this week only)

Fits a Tools or Productivity section if one exists. Thanks for maintaining this list!
